e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML method bodies can now express this.field reads and this.field assignments that lower into Hati table tags 97 and 98 against a record-backed self value. A class-shaped source declaration is parsed with a field and method, then a Hati class image executes the field-reading method against a supplied record.
public_endpoints: not-public-endpoint: local Form/BML/Hati compiler proof surface
test_flows: Parse class Rule[public] with int value and Read method through the existing BML class declaration parser.
Parse int Read() { return this.value + 5; } through the BML executable method source rule.
Construct a Hati class image and run it with record_new(... value 37), returning 42 through fk-rget tag 97.
Parse and run int Set() { this.value = 33; return this.value; }, mutating record-backed self through fk-rset tag 98 and returning 33.
Verify prior Hati kernel, record, method-call, multi-arg, and metal-plane proof surfaces still pass.
